name: Intel Core i5 12600K 12th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i5 12600K 12th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i5 12600K 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i5 12600K 12th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.58,000. This unlocked hybrid CPU offers 10 cores (6 Performance + 4 Efficient) and 16 threads with boost clocks up to 4.9 GHz, delivering strong performance for gaming, content creation, and multitasking.
